meta.title: Li diurn jocu de paroles
meta.description: Divina li parol celat in 6 probas (o minu). Un nov enigma es disponibil chascun die!
meta.keywords: occidental, enigma, parol, jocu, in linea, divinar, diurn

text.no_attempts: You haven't tried any words yet!
text.share_challenge_win: Yo solvit li hodiernal Wordle in {n} provas. Posse tu far plu bon?
text.share_challenge_lose: Yo ne solvit li hodiernal Wordle. E tu?
text.hard_mode_position: Mod desfacil: {letter} deve esser in position {position}
text.hard_mode_contains: Mod desfacil: li proba deve contener {letter}

help.title: How to Play
help.text_1_2: Each guess must be a valid five letter word. Press the enter button to submit your guess.
help.text_1_3: After you guess, the tiles will change color to indicate which letters of your word are correct or almost correct.
help.text_2_1: is in the word and in the correct location!
help.text_2_2: is in the word, but not in the correct location.
help.text_2_3: is not present in the word you are trying to guess.
help.text_3: A new word will be available each day!

ui.word_info_desc: Definition e arte AI pos li jocu
ui.install_app_desc: Jocar sin-linea e obtener li icone
ui.play_more_languages: Joca plu lingues por vider tui statistica global!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Joca Wordle chascun die quam un app
ui.no_games_yet: Tu ancor ne ha jocat. Selecte un lingue por comensar!
ui.easy_desc: Qualcunc parol es acceptat, mem si ne es in li dictionarium
ui.normal_desc: Li probas deve esser valid paroles del dictionarium
ui.hard_desc: Li revelat indicies deve esser usat in li sequent probas
ui.todays_word_reveal: Li parol de hodie — Joca por revelar!
ui.future_word: Ti parol ancor ne ha esset jocat. Reveni plu tard!
ui.difficulty_locked: Ne posse cambiar li desfacilitá pos divination
